facts.question: Can octopuses have more than one heart?
facts.answer: Yes! An octopus actually has three hearts. Two pump blood to the gills, and one pumps it to the rest of the body.

facts.question: Is it possible for honey to never spoil?
facts.answer: Yes! Honey can last thousands of years if sealed properly. Archaeologists have found edible honey in ancient Egyptian tombs.

facts.question: Do bananas count as berries?
facts.answer: Surprisingly, yes! Botanically speaking, bananas are berries, but strawberries are not.

facts.question: Can sharks live longer than humans?
facts.answer: Some can! The Greenland shark can live for over 400 years, making it one of the longest-living vertebrates.

facts.question: Is there a planet where it rains diamonds?
facts.answer: Scientists believe that on Neptune and Uranus, extreme pressure may cause diamond rain.
